parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.1-8b-instant', temperature: 0, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are an intent classifier for JARVIS 4.5, an AI Operating Assistant. Analyze the user message and classify into exactly one category. Available intents: general_chat, youtube_search, youtube_download, drive_list, drive_search, drive_upload, drive_download, drive_delete, gmail_search, gmail_read, gmail_send, gmail_delete, calendar_list, calendar_create, calendar_delete, translate, contacts_list, contacts_search, contacts_create, docs_create, docs_read, docs_edit, slides_create, sheets_read, sheets_write, local_screenshot, local_browser, local_app, local_file, local_shell, local_system. Output ONLY JSON: {"intent": "name", "confidence": 0.0-1.0, "params": {}}' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Message: ' + ($json.inputText || '') }] }) }}
